heading: Question S1Q1
text:
An object has moved through a
distance. Can it have zero
displacement? If yes, support
your answer with an example.

heading: Question S1Q2
text:
A farmer moves along the
boundary of a square field of side
10 m in 40 s. What will be the
magnitude of displacement of the
farmer at the end of 2 minutes 20
seconds from his initial position?

heading: Question S1Q3
text:
Which of the following is true for
displacement?

heading: Question S2Q3
text:
What does the odometer of an
automobile measure?

heading: Question S2Q4
text:
What does the path of an object
look like when it is in uniform
motion?

heading: Question S3Q2
text:
A bus decreases its speed from
80 km h-1 to 60 km h-1 in 5 s.
Find the acceleration of the bus.

heading: Question S3Q3
text:
A train starting from a railway
station and moving with uniform
acceleration attains a speed
40 km h-1 in 10 minutes. Find
its acceleration.

heading: Question S4Q1
text:
What is the nature of the
distance-time graphs for uniform
and non-uniform motion of an
object?

heading: Question S4Q2
text:
What can you say about the
motion of an object whose
distance-time graph is a straight
line parallel to the time axis?

heading: Question S4Q4
text:
What is the quantity which is
measured by the area occupied
below the velocity-time graph?
